info.title: Yowyob ERP - Accounting API
info.description: REST API for OHADA compliant accounting module

tags.name: Accounting Entries
tags.description: Management of accounting entries with Kafka + Redis + Multi-tenant

tags.name: Accounting Fiscal Years
tags.description: Endpoints for managing fiscal years (exercices comptables)

tags.name: Accounting Operations
tags.description: Management of accounting operations with Kafka, Redis and multi-tenancy

tags.name: Accounting Periods
tags.description: Comprehensive management of accounting periods (creation, update, closing, retrieval).

tags.name: Accounting Tax Declarations
tags.description: Management of VAT, IS, and other tax declarations.

tags.name: Accounting Plan Comptable
tags.description: Accounting plan management: creation, update, deactivation, and search.

tags.name: Accounting Financial Reports
tags.description: Generation and exportation of financial reports (Balance Sheet, Income Statement, etc.)

tags.name: Accounting Journals
tags.description: Comprehensive management of accounting journals (creation, update, deletion, retrieval).

tags.name: Accounting Invoice Upload
tags.description: Endpoints for uploading and processing invoice documents via OCR

get.summary: Get an accounting account by ID

delete.description: Deactivates an account instead of deleting it.

get.summary: Retrieve an accounting period by ID
Retrieve an accounting operation by ID

delete.description: Deletes an existing accounting operation by ID.

get.description: Returns the full details of an accounting journal by its ID.

put.description: Updates the information of an existing journal.

delete.description: Deletes an accounting journal by its ID.

post.summary: Save or update a tax declaration

post.description: Creates a new account for the current tenant.

400.description: Validation error or account already exists

post.description: Creates a default set of accounts for the given tenant.

400.description: Validation error or tenant already initialized

post.description: Adds a new accounting period for the current tenant.
Creates a new accounting operation for the current tenant.

get.description: Complete list of accounting journals for the current tenant.

post.description: Adds a new accounting journal for the current tenant.

post.summary: Upload and analyze an invoice document

get.summary: Get all fiscal years for current tenant

post.description: Creates a new entry after period and journal validation.

post.summary: Generate an entry from an accounting object

get.summary: Get all agencies for current tenant
Get a tax declaration by ID
Search tax declarations by period range
List periods within a date range
Retrieve an accounting period by date
Search operation by type and settlement mode
Retrieve accounting operations by principal account
Get active fiscal year for a given date
Get an accounting entry by ID

delete.summary: Delete an accounting entry (if not validated)

get.summary: Search entries by period and journal
